hero.title: AI Document Assistant for Small Businesses
hero.subtitle: Generate quotes, invoices, payment reminders, and client emails in seconds.

features.title: Core Features
features.subtitle: Three tools covering the most common business document needs

quote.title: Quote Generator
quote.desc: Create professional quotes from simple business details, in English or Chinese.

invoice.title: Invoice Generator
invoice.desc: Generate clean invoices with payment terms, item details, and tax calculations.

email.title: Business Email Generator
email.desc: Write payment reminders, follow-ups, and client emails instantly with the right tone.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to professional documents
howItWorks.subtitle: No templates to learn. Just fill in the basics and let AI do the rest.

step1.title: Enter your details
step1.desc: Fill in client name, amount, and service description in 30 seconds

step2.title: AI generates instantly
step2.desc: Click generate and get a formatted, professional document in seconds

step3.title: Copy or export PDF
step3.desc: Copy the text or download a clean PDF to send directly to your client

why.title: Why BizDoc AI
items: Built for freelancers and small businesses — ready to use instantly
Bilingual output in Chinese and English for local and international clients
Three tools in one: quotes, invoices, and business emails
Save your company profile once, auto-fill every form
Free tier includes 5 generations per month for casual use

cta.title: Start today, no credit card required
cta.subtitle: Sign up free and get 5 document generations per month.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free users get 5 generations per month. Upgrade to Pro for more usage, full history, and PDF export.

free.name: Free
free.desc: For individuals who use it occasionally

pricing.upgradeNote: To upgrade: scan WeChat Pay or Alipay, then contact support with your registered email and payment note.
pricing.upgradeNoteIntl: Manual confirmation is used now. Automatic activation will be added after official merchant payment callbacks are connected.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Scan WeChat Pay or Alipay, include your registered email in the payment note, and contact support. We'll activate your plan within 24 hours after verification.
faq.a2: Yes, your generation quota resets automatically each month on a fixed date.
faq.a3: If you're not satisfied, contact support within 7 days of purchase for a full refund.

login.title: Welcome to BizDoc AI
login.checkEmail: Check your email and click the confirmation link to complete sign-up.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

common.upgradeRequired: Upgrade to Pro to use this feature
common.quotaExhausted: Monthly quota exhausted. Please upgrade to continue.
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

tools.textModeHint: Describe your items in plain text, e.g. "3 office desks at $500 each; 6 chairs at $200 each"

quote.pageDesc: Enter your details and AI will generate a professional quote

invoice.pageDesc: Generate a professional invoice with payment terms

email.pageDesc: Choose the email type, enter key points, and AI writes the email
email.subject: Subject Line

dashboard.title: Generation History
dashboard.freeLimit: Free plan shows only the last 3 records. Upgrade to Pro for full history.
dashboard.emptyState: No generations yet. Try one of the tools!

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.desc: Enter your registered email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.successDesc: Check your inbox and click the link to reset your password. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
forgotPassword.error: Failed to send. Please check your email address.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been reset successfully. Redirecting…
resetPassword.errorWeak: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.errorGeneric: Reset failed. Please request a new reset link.

account.title: Account Settings
account.companyProfileDesc: Save once, auto-fill into all tool forms
account.upgradeNote: Send payment via PayPal and contact support with your registered email to activate.
